format_note: Curated cooldown library, keyed by workout type slug. Per-move fields: move, duration, cue, image_url (optional, falls back to emoji), video_url (specific YouTube embed link if known), video_query (YouTube search fallback). The app picks 'push' / 'pull' / 'legs' / etc. based on the active day's type. Per-day cooldown text authored in the Weekly Plan MD overrides this fallback.

apple_fitness_plus.note: On iPhone, this is a Universal Link — opens the Fitness app directly to the Mindful Cooldown category if installed. Filter inside the app for Upper Body / Lower Body / Full Body. 5–10 min sessions.

moves.cue: Forearm on door frame, elbow at shoulder height, step through until you feel chest stretch
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Chest And Front Of Shoulder Stretch — same target muscle; doorway is the wall-supported variation. Wikimedia did not have a doorway-specific image.
moves.video_query: doorway chest stretch how to proper form

moves.cue: Pull arm across body at chest height, use opposite hand at elbow
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Shoulder Stretch — this is the cross-body horizontal-adduction stretch.
moves.video_query: cross body shoulder stretch how to

moves.cue: Side-lying, shoulder and elbow 90°, gently press forearm toward floor
moves.image_match: yuhonas: closest available shoulder stretch — sleeper stretch (side-lying internal rotation) not separately illustrated. Wikimedia search for 'sleeper stretch shoulder' returned no useful images.
moves.video_query: sleeper stretch shoulder internal rotation how to

moves.cue: Reach hand down between shoulder blades, use opposite hand to gently press elbow back
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Overhead Triceps — direct match.
moves.video_query: overhead tricep stretch how to

moves.cue: Walk hands forward, sink hips back, feel lat + shoulder opening
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Childs Pose — base pose; arm-reach is a variation of the same form.
moves.video_query: childs pose arm reach yoga how to

moves.cue: 5–6 slow cycles, big breath each direction
moves.image_source: Wikimedia Commons — 'Yoga at Your Park - Bitilasana' (CC-licensed)
moves.image_match: Wikipedia Cat/Cow pose article (Marjariasana / Bitilasana). yuhonas has only 'Cat Stretch' (the cat half) — Wikimedia better captures the full cat-cow cycle.
moves.video_query: cat cow stretch yoga how to

pull.name: Pull-day cooldown (back / lats / rear delts / biceps)

moves.move: Lat hang (DB rack or pull-up bar)
moves.cue: Passive hang, let shoulders decompress
moves.image_match: yuhonas: One Handed Hang — closest passive-hang illustration; two-handed variant not separately illustrated.
moves.video_query: passive hang pull up bar how to

moves.cue: From child's pose, walk both hands to one side to stretch the opposite lat
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Childs Pose — base pose; side-reach is a variation.
moves.video_query: childs pose side reach lat stretch how to

moves.cue: Press chest up, shoulders down and back, gentle thoracic extension
moves.image_source: Wikimedia Commons — Bhujangasana by Nina Mel (CC-licensed)
moves.image_match: Wikipedia Cobra pose article (Bhujangasana). yuhonas stretching category has no cobra / upward-dog entry.
moves.video_query: cobra pose upward dog yoga how to

moves.cue: Arm extended back at shoulder height, palm on wall, rotate body away
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Standing Biceps Stretch — closest illustration; doorway-anchored variation not separately illustrated.
moves.video_query: doorway biceps stretch how to

moves.cue: Quadruped, thread one arm under the body, rotate gently into the shoulder
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Spinal Stretch — closest thoracic-rotation illustration. Wikimedia Commons did not return a clean thread-the-needle pose image.
moves.video_query: thread the needle yoga how to

moves.cue: 5–6 slow cycles
moves.image_source: Wikimedia Commons — 'Yoga at Your Park - Bitilasana' (CC-licensed)
moves.image_match: Wikipedia Cat/Cow pose article (Marjariasana / Bitilasana). yuhonas has only 'Cat Stretch' (the cat half) — Wikimedia better captures the full cat-cow cycle.
moves.video_query: cat cow stretch yoga how to

moves.cue: Rear shin against bench/wall, front leg in lunge, sink hips and squeeze glute of stretching leg
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Kneeling Hip Flexor — the couch stretch is a kneeling hip flexor with the rear shin elevated against a couch/wall. Closest available illustration.
moves.video_query: couch stretch Kelly Starrett how to

moves.cue: Front shin perpendicular to body, sink hips, walk hands forward for deeper stretch
moves.image_source: Wikimedia Commons — Yoga Shaktipat Rajakapotasana by Alexey Baykov (CC-licensed)
moves.image_match: Wikipedia Eka Pada Rajakapotasana article. yuhonas stretching category has no pigeon pose.
moves.video_query: pigeon pose yoga how to

moves.cue: Foot on bench, hinge from hips with flat back, don't round
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Standing Toe Touches — same target (standing hamstring stretch). Foot-on-bench variation not separately illustrated.
moves.video_query: standing hamstring stretch foot on bench how to

moves.cue: Front and back leg both at 90°, lean forward over front leg
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Seated Glute — closest seated hip-rotation illustration. yuhonas '90/90 Hamstring' is a different move (hamstring stretch). Wikimedia did not return a clean 90/90 hip stretch image.
moves.video_query: 90 90 hip stretch how to

moves.cue: Hands on wall, rear leg straight, heel down, press hips forward
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Standing Gastrocnemius Calf Stretch — direct match.
moves.video_query: standing calf stretch wall how to

moves.cue: Lying on back, ankle on opposite knee, pull thigh toward chest
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Lying Glute — direct match for supine figure-4 (ankle on opposite knee, pull thigh toward chest).
moves.video_query: figure 4 glute stretch supine how to

moves.cue: Big toes touching, knees wide, sink hips toward heels
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Childs Pose — direct match.
moves.video_query: childs pose yoga how to

upper-hybrid.name: Upper-hybrid cooldown (shoulders / rear delts / arms / core)

moves.cue: Pull arm across body
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Shoulder Stretch — this is the cross-body horizontal-adduction stretch.
moves.video_query: cross body shoulder stretch how to

moves.cue: Forearm on frame, step through
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Chest And Front Of Shoulder Stretch — same target muscle; doorway is the wall-supported variation. Wikimedia did not have a doorway-specific image.
moves.video_query: doorway chest stretch how to

moves.cue: Passive hang, decompress shoulders
moves.image_match: yuhonas: One Handed Hang — closest passive-hang illustration.
moves.video_query: passive hang pull up bar how to

moves.cue: Hand between shoulder blades, opposite hand presses elbow
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Overhead Triceps — direct match.
moves.video_query: overhead tricep stretch how to

moves.cue: Quadruped, rotate one shoulder under
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Spinal Stretch — closest thoracic-rotation illustration. Wikimedia Commons did not return a clean thread-the-needle pose image.
moves.video_query: thread the needle yoga how to

moves.cue: Gentle thoracic extension, shoulders down
moves.image_source: Wikimedia Commons — Bhujangasana by Nina Mel (CC-licensed)
moves.image_match: Wikipedia Cobra pose article (Bhujangasana). yuhonas stretching category has no cobra entry.
moves.video_query: cobra pose yoga how to

moves.cue: Decompress spine, breathe deep
moves.image_match: yuhonas: Childs Pose — direct match.
moves.video_query: childs pose yoga how to

moves.cue: 5–6 slow cycles
moves.image_source: Wikimedia Commons — 'Yoga at Your Park - Bitilasana' (CC-licensed)
moves.image_match: Wikipedia Cat/Cow pose article (Marjariasana / Bitilasana). yuhonas has only 'Cat Stretch' (the cat half) — Wikimedia better captures the full cat-cow cycle.
moves.video_query: cat cow stretch yoga how to

moves.cue: Thoracic extension
moves.image_source: Wikimedia Commons — Bhujangasana by Nina Mel (CC-licensed)
moves.image_match: Wikipedia Cobra pose article (Bhujangasana). yuhonas stretching category has no cobra / upward-dog entry.
moves.video_query: cobra pose upward dog yoga how to

moves.cue: Hip opener
moves.image_source: Wikimedia Commons — Yoga Shaktipat Rajakapotasana by Alexey Baykov (CC-licensed)
moves.image_match: Wikipedia Eka Pada Rajakapotasana article. yuhonas stretching category has no pigeon pose.
moves.video_query: pigeon pose yoga how to

moves.cue: Soft knees, let head and arms hang
moves.image_match: Wikipedia Uttanasana article — canonical standing forward-fold illustration. yuhonas 'Standing Toe Touches' is a close move but Uttanasana is the named pose.
moves.video_query: standing forward fold yoga how to
